title: Pronouncing Katakana Loan Words
learningGoal: The learner will accurately pronounce common English loan words adapted into Japanese Katakana, focusing on the elongation mark (ー) and syllable adjustments.
instructions: Listen to the native pronunciation of these common Katakana words. Remember to drop your native English accent. Pay close attention to the elongation mark (ー) and make sure you hold those vowels longer. Record yourself speaking each word clearly.

contentItems.text: The biggest challenge with loan words is that you already know the English version. You have to train your brain to say them the Japanese way. Every consonant needs a vowel, and the 'v' sound becomes a 'b' sound.

targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Pronouncing it like the English word 'coffee' with a short 'o' and an 'f' sound. Japanese has no 'f' sound here, it's an 'h'.
Swallowing the middle syllables like in English. Every beat must be pronounced.
Making the 'x' sound. It is split into 'ku' and 'shi'.
Swallowing the 'L'. The Japanese 'R' replaces the 'L' and is a light tap.
Cutting it short at the 's'. You must pronounce the 'u' at the end: ba-su.
Trying to say 'Televi'. Japanese has no V sound, so it becomes B.
Using a harsh English 'R' at the end.
Failing to pronounce the 'e' at the end. It's not 'toirel', it's 'to-i-re'.
Pronouncing it like the English word 'pan' (as in frying pan). The 'a' is an 'ah' sound.

expectedPronunciationText: コーヒー コンピューター タクシー ホテル バス テレビ カメラ トイレ ジュース パン

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! You've successfully adapted your pronunciation to the Japanese phonetic system.
feedbackRules.onFail: Remember, do not use your English accent. Pronounce every single vowel clearly.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Pay closer attention to the words with elongation marks (ー) and hold those vowels longer.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: コーヒー コンピューター タクシー ホテル バス テレビ カメラ トイレ ジュース パン
acceptedVariants: koohii konpyuutaa takushii hoteru basu terebi kamera toire juusu pan
kohi konpyuta takushi hoteru basu terebi kamera toire jusu pan
adminCorrectAnswerSet.syllableSplitReference: ko-o-hi-i ko-n-pyu-u-ta-a ta-ku-shi-i ho-te-ru ba-su te-re-bi ka-me-ra to-i-re ju-u-su pa-n
adminCorrectAnswerSet.phoneticApproximation: koh-hee kon-pyuu-taa tah-ku-shee ho-teh-roo bah-soo teh-reh-bee kah-meh-rah toy-reh jyuu-soo pahn
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: コーヒー コンピューター タクシー ホテル バス テレビ カメラ トイレ ジュース パン
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: Koohii Konpyuutaa Takushii Hoteru Basu Terebi Kamera Toire Juusu Pan

audioAssets.audioTranscript: コーヒー。コンピューター。タクシー。ホテル。バス。テレビ。カメラ。トイレ。ジュース。パン。

hintText: Pretend you have never heard the English versions of these words. Read them exactly as the Japanese syllables tell you to.
commonMistakes: Using an English 'V' instead of a Japanese 'B' for 'Terebi'.
Making the vowels too short where a long mark (ー) exists.
